system_rules: run preflight system compatibility check before booking
close laptop screen when using an external monitor
disable operating system and application notifications
physical_space_rules: no one else in the room
desk and work area must be clear
electronic items must not be operational
no phone or smartwatch in the room
pre_exam_checklist: confirm GitHub login works for the exam portal
verify account name matches every name on the ID
test that the ID text is readable on camera
complete the preflight compatibility check and save evidence
prepare a clear desk and room scan path

risk_controls.id_name_mismatch: contact HashiCorp certification support at least 3 business days before the appointment
risk_controls.blurry_id_camera: test ID readability on the webcam and keep passport as backup
risk_controls.system_failure: run the compatibility check before booking and keep a screenshot
risk_controls.unexpected_notification: disable OS, antivirus, chat, and browser notifications
risk_controls.room_scan_issue: clear the desk and prepare to show under the table
